IKIGAIоЎҪоЎҪоЎҪоЎҪо ёо ёо ёоЁЈпҒҒпҒҒпҒҒоЈҘо ӢWhat do you love?This is about joy, not just hobbies. We're looking for activities that make you lose track of timeвҖ”where effort feels effortless. Be honest; there's no 'right' answer.What are you good at?Skills you've built AND talents that come easily to you both count. Include soft skills like empathy or problem-solving, not just technical abilities.What can you be paid for?This grounds your passion in reality. We're looking for where your skills meet market demand. If you're uncertain, that's okayвҖ”we'll suggest paths that help you discover this.What does the world need?This isn't about saving the worldвҖ”it's about what problems you personally care about solving.Next questionо—ҲCURRENT LIFE CONTEXTWe need to know where you are to suggest where to go.о•ҡоўҳо ёо ёо ёо ёо ёоҷҹWHAT BEST DESCRIBES YOUR CURRENT SITUATION?Student exploring optionsEarly in career, feeling stuckMid-career, seeking changeBetween jobs/careersBuilding something newRetired/transitioning to new phaseWHAT'S YOUR BIGGEST CONSTRAINT RIGHT NOW?Time (full-time job/commitments)Money (need stable income)Skills (need to learn new things)Confidence (fear of failure)Clarity (don't know what I want)WHAT MATTERS MOST IN YOUR NEXT CHAPTER?
